risk_control: Amplify only packets, gates, dashboards, tests, and review paths until external evidence exists.
rollback_path: Archive weak derivatives and keep only the smallest reusable canon kernel.
next_least_action: Use x10 packet schema to generate ten governed derivatives from the Best Fusion Kernel, then route each through ClaimRouter and ContinuousGovernance.
notes: Capacity x10, not hype x10. Evidence passports x10 before claims x10.
